title: Ex-IAS Officer Subodh Agarwal Arrested In Rs 900 Crore Jal Jeevan Mission Scam
description: Jaipur, April 9 (IANS) Former IAS officer Subodh Agarwal, who had been absconding in connection with the Jal Jeevan Mission (JJM) scam in Rajasthan, has been arrested by the Anti-Corruption Bureau (ACB), officials said on Thursday.
